title: Large PDF pipeline spikes (GH #111/#112/#113/#114)
description:
Epic: Large PDF Pipeline — scale to real-world 200-page petitions

## GH Issues
- Parent: https://github.com/civictechdc/votecatcher/issues/111
- RAM/streaming: https://github.com/civictechdc/votecatcher/issues/114
- Provider limits: https://github.com/civictechdc/votecatcher/issues/112
- Image compression: https://github.com/civictechdc/votecatcher/issues/113

## Problem
Current pipeline loads all crop images into RAM simultaneously. 200-page petition = OOM on 1GB VM. Provider batch file limit hit (200MB OpenAI). No chunking or resume.

## Execution Order
1. Spike: RAM/streaming (#114) — highest value
2. Spike: Image compression (#113) — quick benchmark
3. Spike: Provider limits + splitting (#112) — depends on #113 format choice
4. Spike: Upload strategy (#111) — umbrella, informed by above
